# profection

```go
import "github.com/shaobaobaoer/solarsage-mcp/pkg/profection"
```

Package profection implements annual and monthly profections, a traditional time\-lord technique that advances the Ascendant by one sign per year.

CalcAnnualProfection returns the profected sign, house, and time\-lord ruler for a given age. CalcMonthlyProfections breaks down a year into monthly sub\-periods. ProfectionTimeline produces a multi\-year overview.

  - [func ProfectionTimeline\(natalASC float64, natalHouses \[\]float64, startAge, endAge int\) \[\]ProfectionResult](<#ProfectionTimeline>)


<a name="MonthlyProfection"></a>
## type [MonthlyProfection](<https://github.com/shaobaobaoer/SolarSage/blob/main/pkg/profection/profection.go#L39-L44>)

MonthlyProfection returns the monthly sub\-profection within an annual profection year. Each month advances one sign from the annual profected sign.

```go
type MonthlyProfection struct {
    Month           int             `json:"month"`
    ProfectedSign   string          `json:"profected_sign"`
    TimeLord        models.PlanetID `json:"time_lord"`
    TraditionalLord models.PlanetID `json:"traditional_time_lord"`
}
```

<a name="CalcMonthlyProfections"></a>
### func [CalcMonthlyProfections](<https://github.com/shaobaobaoer/SolarSage/blob/main/pkg/profection/profection.go#L47>)

```go
func CalcMonthlyProfections(natalASC float64, age int) []MonthlyProfection
```

CalcMonthlyProfections returns 12 monthly profections for the given year

<a name="ProfectionResult"></a>
## type [ProfectionResult](<https://github.com/shaobaobaoer/SolarSage/blob/main/pkg/profection/profection.go#L10-L17>)

ProfectionResult holds the annual profection analysis

```go
type ProfectionResult struct {
    Age             int             `json:"age"`
    ProfectedSign   string          `json:"profected_sign"`
    ProfectedHouse  int             `json:"profected_house"`
    TimeLord        models.PlanetID `json:"time_lord"`
    TraditionalLord models.PlanetID `json:"traditional_time_lord"`
    ProfectedASC    float64         `json:"profected_asc"`
}
```

<a name="CalcAnnualProfection"></a>
### func [CalcAnnualProfection](<https://github.com/shaobaobaoer/SolarSage/blob/main/pkg/profection/profection.go#L21>)

```go
func CalcAnnualProfection(natalASC float64, natalHouses []float64, age int) ProfectionResult
```

CalcAnnualProfection computes the annual profection for a given age. The profected sign advances one sign per year from the natal ASC sign.

```go
func ProfectionTimeline(natalASC float64, natalHouses []float64, startAge, endAge int) []ProfectionResult
```

ProfectionTimeline returns annual profections for a range of ages
